improvement: Added a reusable blocked-deployment evidence builder and a workflow that preserves privacy-safe blocker evidence when Cloudflare credentials are absent, without claiming deployment success.

verification.route: isolated Node runtime using byte-equivalent committed contract logic

epistemic_limit: The new packet can prove that deployment is blocked by named configuration requirements. It cannot prove that Cloudflare deployed or served the research surface.
remaining_blocker: Configure the cloudflare-research GitHub Environment and execute the production deployment workflow to obtain a resolving URL, served identity, and deployed commit.
